findings_actioned.issue: dropped --brief-version → a brief_version!=1 decision emits brief@v1 while cycle_go is v2 → predicate.brief(cid, v2) stays None → that candidate is blocked / re-emit-loops

findings_actioned.issue: partially vacuous — passed even if plan() never early-exits, because RefEventStore absorbs duplicate-id emits (executed mutation #6 STAYED-GREEN proved this; an adversarial agent wrongly argued non-vacuity by reasoning about UNMUTATED control flow — executed evidence overruled it)
findings_actioned.fix: spy on overseer_emit.main and assert 0 calls on the second run (test_confirm_idempotent_second_run_calls_no_emit)

findings_actioned.issue: dead constant — defined but never read; the Q4 guard was enforced only by plan()'s hardcoded ifs + _emit_argv ValueError (misleading)
findings_actioned.fix: plan() now derives emittable FROM _EMITTABLE via a presence map → constant is load-bearing AND the Q4 guard is mutation-catchable through it
